description: Design legible expressions and custom animations for the ESP32-S3 8x8 LED matrix (Claude's expression channel — matrix_express / matrix_animate / the CANNED library in mcp_server/expressions.ts). Use whenever creating, redesigning, or debugging a glyph or animation that has to read on the physical 64-pixel panel — including when an expression "doesn't read," looks like one flat color, flickers, or freezes the board.

rows.query: the working spinner looks like garbage on the panel, can you redesign it so it actually reads as 'busy' when you're compiling something?
make a new expression for when you're blocked waiting on me — something that grabs my attention on the matrix but isn't annoying like a strobe
the sparkle expression just looks like one flat blue color at brightness 5, i can't see any of the twinkle. fix it
draw a little custom animation of a coffee cup with steam rising and save it so you can replay it later when you take a break
the heart glyph is reading as pink instead of red on the LEDs, sort out the color
can you make the done checkmark flash a few times before it settles instead of just popping on?
i want a rocket expression that flies upward with a flame trail, the last attempt was super choppy and only had like 3 frames
the party celebration looks disjointed — every frame is a totally different shape. make it read more like falling confetti
add a thumbs-down to your canned expressions for when a test fails
firing that 24-frame full-panel sparkle froze the whole board and i had to reflash. why, and how do i keep it from happening?
add a new fire animation mode to the firmware with its own control page and a palette picker, wire it into the dispatch
i just edited the .ino, walk me through uploading it and the LittleFS data and confirming it runs on the board
the board won't join my wifi, it keeps falling back to the ESP32-Matrix-Setup hotspot at 192.168.4.1
add a humidity option to the weather2 page's F/C mode toggle
the MCP server is throwing -32000 and won't reconnect after i rebuilt it
scroll the text 'HELLO WORLD' across the matrix in green at medium speed
create a new matrix-rain animation mode but make the drops fall faster than the existing one
the calendar 'square' style is misaligned by one pixel column, fix the layout math
what default brightness should the NTP clock use so it's readable but not blinding at night?
write unit tests for the hex color parsing in expressions.ts
